title: anthemis arvensis subsp. nicaeensis
intro: Anthemis arvensis subsp. nicaeensis, also known as a subspecies of the yarrow plant, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Anthemis arvensis subsp. nicaeensis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
